_meta.source: Hand triage 2026-07-10 from the 54-player pardons map (previously the CLASS/ADVOCACY dicts inside out/packages/pardons/_build/export_pardons.py; extracted verbatim into this human-owned file when the industry-review-packager skill was built, 2026-07-11).
_meta.discipline: Classes are assigned by a HUMAN from the filings' own text; beneficiary notes quote ONLY what the filings themselves declare — no outside facts. Classes: seeker = individual person as client, buying a pardon/clemency engagement; seeker_vehicle = organization client whose tagged engagement seeks executive relief/pardon (beneficiary named in text where declared); advocacy = policy organization lobbying on clemency/pardon policy or the pardon power itself; unclear = tagged but purpose not classifiable from the filings alone. New tagged players on a corpus refresh land on the default class until re-triaged.
